session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/download_remote_session.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py
Report any lint errors or if it passes cleanly.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command to lint the specified files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check lint rules for download_remote_session files

session.assistant:
**ruff passed:** All checks passed!
Both files are clean: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/download_remote_session.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py`
No lint violations found.
